title: About | Synnergy Lab
description: Page explaining how Synnergy Lab works as a strategic marketing agency.
heading: How Synnergy Lab works
intro: This page summarizes the agency's operating logic: diagnosis, strategic direction, orderly execution, and continuous optimization.

sections.title: Diagnose before acting
sections.body: We first understand the business, market, and value proposition to avoid reactive decisions.

sections.title: Build a system
sections.body: We define a clear structure of audiences, channels, goals, and messages to support growth.

sections.title: Measure to improve
sections.body: Execution only matters when it is supported by strategic reading and continuous adjustments.
